subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness, through His own Self unto His own Self, in the glory of His sovereignty, that verily there is no God but Him, and that 'Alí is His Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله بذاته لذاته فی عز سلطانه بانه لا اله الا هو و ان علیا لظهوره و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @proofs of the Manifestations of God
